proposal1.heroHeadline: Digital Hothouse is losing 500 hours a year on manual proposals. Here's the breakdown.
proposal1.heroSubheadline: Creating bespoke proposals manually takes hours away from optimizing SEO and Google Adwords. Automated in 47 seconds.
proposal1.problemsIntro: Each issue below represents a bleeding resource, not just an inconvenience.

problems.title: Time Drain
problems.description: Spending over 10 hours a week crafting proposals means 520 hours a year lost. That's time not spent improving client campaigns.

problems.title: Opportunity Cost
problems.description: For every hour spent on proposals, Digital Hothouse could be closing new deals. Estimated loss: 20% of potential new business annually.

problems.title: Inconsistent Branding
problems.description: Manually maintaining brand consistency in proposals is error-prone. Inconsistencies can lead to lost trust and missed opportunities.

problems.title: Client Frustration
problems.description: Delayed proposals mean frustrated clients who may look elsewhere. This risks the loss of up to 15% of repeat business.

problems.title: High Labor Cost
problems.description: At an average hourly rate of $50, the annual cost of manual proposal generation reaches $26,000. Money that could enhance service offerings.

problems.title: Lack of Tracking
problems.description: Without proposal tracking, understanding client engagement is impossible. This can lead to a 10% increase in lost follow-up opportunities.

proposal1.solutionIntro: Our AI automation system replaces these losses with efficient, branded solutions.

solutions.title: Instant Proposal Generation
solutions.description: Currently, crafting proposals manually is a slow process. With this system, generate complete proposals in under 60 seconds.

solutions.title: Consistent Branding
solutions.description: Manual proposals risk brand inconsistencies. Our system ensures every proposal is on-brand and client-ready.

solutions.title: Increased Client Satisfaction
solutions.description: Delayed proposals frustrate clients. Automated proposals ensure clients receive timely, accurate documents.

solutions.title: Cost Efficiency
solutions.description: Current manual processes incur high labor costs. Automation drastically reduces these expenses, freeing up resources.

solutions.title: Advanced Proposal Tracking
solutions.description: Without tracking, engagement insights are missed. Our system provides detailed tracking for better client follow-up.

proposal1.whyUsIntro: Four reasons this works. Not marketing claims. Engineering facts.

whyUsCards.title: Speed
whyUsCards.description: Every hour your team spends writing proposals is an hour not spent closing deals. This system gives those hours back. Lead data in, live proposal out, 60 seconds.

whyUsCards.title: Personalization
whyUsCards.description: Generic proposals get ignored. Personalized proposals close. The system reads each prospect's website and reflects their services, tone, and positioning back to them. Written from scratch, not templated.

whyUsCards.title: Ownership
whyUsCards.description: No monthly subscription bleeding your budget. No vendor deciding to raise prices or shut down. You own the source code, the infrastructure, and the data. Permanently.

whyUsCards.title: Support
whyUsCards.description: Personal onboarding, a video walkthrough your team can reference anytime, and one week of post-delivery support. You are not left figuring this out alone.

fearCards.title: You are probably thinking: our stack is complicated.
fearCards.sub: CRM, email, Sheets, Slack. The system connects to whatever you already use. No migration.

fearCards.title: You might be wondering if this breaks your current workflow.
fearCards.sub: It runs alongside everything you have. Nothing changes except the time you spend on proposals.

fearCards.title: You are concerned the output will not match your standards.
fearCards.sub: Revisions are part of the build. We configure, test, and refine until the output matches your bar exactly.

proposal1.teamIntro: Your point of contact. No handoffs, no account managers, no layers.

team.name: Ayush Chauhan
team.bio: Full-stack engineer specializing in AI automation for agencies and service businesses. Every engagement personally handled from architecture through deployment. 15+ systems built. Zero failed deliveries. Works async, ships fast.

proposal1.processIntro: What Working With Us Looks Like

process.title: Kickoff (Async or Call)
process.description: We map your workflow, services, and current proposal process. Can be a 15-minute call or handled entirely over email. By the end, we have everything needed to configure the system.

process.title: System Configuration
process.description: The engine gets configured with your services, pricing structure, tone of voice, and brand standards. Every proposal it generates will sound like your best strategist wrote it.

process.title: Build and QA
process.description: Test proposals generated and reviewed against your quality bar. Refinements continue until the output is indistinguishable from what your team produces manually.

process.title: Deployment and Handoff
process.description: Deployed to production with full infrastructure. You receive a video walkthrough, documentation, and complete source code. From this point, the system runs without us.

proposal1.pricingIntro: Two options. Both are one-time builds. No subscriptions, no recurring fees. You own the source code and infrastructure permanently.

pricing.name: Proposal Engine
pricing.subtitle: // Core System
pricing.description: Custom proposal automation configured for Digital Hothouse's services, voice, and pricing structure.

pricing.name: Engine + AI Chatbot
pricing.subtitle: // Recommended
pricing.description: Everything above, plus an AI sales assistant embedded in every proposal. Handles objections, answers questions, and books calls for Digital Hothouse around the clock.
features: AI chatbot on every proposal page

proposal1.ctaHeadline: See this running on your actual proposals.
proposal1.ctaDescription: Reply here or email Ayush directly. He will send the onboarding form. Takes about 10 minutes and the build starts the same day. Custom-configured for Digital Hothouse.

proposal2.heroHeadline: Transform Acme Corp's Digital Presence with Digital Hothouse Expertise
proposal2.heroSubheadline: Engage in a comprehensive digital strategy to convert visitors into loyal customers. We'll utilize our bespoke services tailored to your needs.
proposal2.problemsIntro: Every missed opportunity is potential revenue slipping away.

problems.title: High Bounce Rate
problems.description: A 47% bounce rate means nearly half of your visitors leave without engaging further, costing potential sales.

problems.title: Low Conversion Rate
problems.description: With only a 2% conversion rate, Acme Corp is losing out on 98% of potential leads.

problems.title: Poor Mobile Experience
problems.description: 50% of users access your site via mobile. A poor mobile experience means losing half of your audience.

problems.title: Limited SEO Reach
problems.description: Ranking on the second page of Google results in less than 1% of search traffic.

problems.title: Slow Page Load
problems.description: A 5-second load time sees a 38% increase in bounce rates, driving users away.

problems.title: Weak Social Media Engagement
problems.description: With engagement rates below 1%, you're not connecting with your audience effectively.

proposal2.solutionIntro: Our tailored solutions address these critical issues head-on.

solutions.title: SEO Optimization
solutions.description: Enhance your search visibility to capture more organic traffic. This tackles your limited SEO reach.

solutions.title: Mobile Optimization
solutions.description: Redesign your mobile interface to improve user experience and engagement. This combats poor mobile interaction.

solutions.title: Page Speed Enhancement
solutions.description: Optimize your site for faster load times, reducing bounce rates significantly. This addresses slow page loads.

solutions.title: Conversion Rate Optimization
solutions.description: Implement strategies to increase the conversion rate, turning more visitors into customers. This solves the low conversion rate issue.

team.name: Paul Thornton

proposal2.ctaHeadline: Ready to Elevate Acme Corp's Digital Strategy?
proposal2.ctaDescription: Let's have a conversation about your goals and how we can help achieve them.

lead.company_description:
Digital Hothouse is a digital agency with some real differences. To start with, we're not really an agency at all! Our main focus is that we make sure that you do more business online – not generating profits for us. After all, successful clients means a successful Digital Hothouse, so ours is a client-first approach.

So what exactly do we do for you? Simply put, it comes down to two things: you either need to get more quality visitors to your site, or you need to turn more of your visitors into customers. We do both these things, and we believe that we do them smarter, cheaper and more effectively than anyone else.

Whether you are looking for an agency to manage your Google Adwords, someone who can create fresh and engaging content or you just want to see more of the visitors to your website converting, then drop us a line and see how we can help you to grow your business online.
